titleStmt.title: SII 27.405: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 405. (A.R. No. 593 of 1929-30.) HANDńÄŠłĆI, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab built into a sluice in a field called KambaŠł∑agadde.

This record registers a gift of land for feeding brahmaŠĻáas in the ŇöaŠĻÖkaranńĀrńĀyaŠĻáadńďva temple (of KoŠłćage ?), by SŇćmaŠĻáaya, younger brother of Basavarasa-oŠłćeya and son of Mallarasa-oŠłćeya of HńĀrabhaŠĻáŠłći, for the merit of NarasaŠĻáa-oŠłćeya. It states that the gift land was originally granted to acertain ChandaŠĻáŠĻáa by DńďvarńĀya-mahńĀrńĀja.

It certains two dates, viz., (1) Ňöaka 1424 (1425 current), Dundubhi, KńĀrttika Ňõu. 5 and (2) ńÄsvija ba. 30, Monday, solar eclipse obviously of the year same year. The weekday was, however, Saturday. The latter probably was the date of gift while the former, the details of which are not verifiable, but corresponds to 1502 A.D., October 6, was the date when the record was put on stone.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:

nu AŇõvija ba 30 sŇćmavńĀrada sŇęryyŇćparńĀga puŠĻáya kńĀ
